message:
test(galaxy-brain): add redaction safety tests for ledger output

Add three new tests to verify galaxy-brain ledger output doesn't leak sensitive data:

- test_galaxy_brain_ledger_no_secrets_leak: Checks serialized EvidenceLedger JSON
- test_galaxy_brain_data_no_secrets_leak: Checks serialized GalaxyBrainData JSON
- test_galaxy_brain_why_summary_no_secrets: Checks why_summary and top_evidence fields

Tests check for common sensitive patterns:
- AWS access keys, GitHub/GitLab/Slack tokens
- JWTs, private keys, AI API keys
- Password/token/api-key command arguments

Part of process_triage-aii.4 acceptance criteria for redaction invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
